rationale: Neither candidate reproduces the ground-truth reviewer's concern about whether hasattr-only verification of reduce_scatter is sufficient, but X at least directly discusses that exact test line (validating the reduce_scatter guard logic), while Y never touches it. X also surfaces three concrete, grounded, file:line-anchored findings (stale comment, missing branch test coverage, missing docstring) that are all traceable to the diff. Y's output is mostly a validation checklist recommending APPROVE with a single soft, non-actionable suggestion, giving it lower recall and actionability despite comparable precision.
